## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss upcoming Toric events and align on GrowthX's support for social media content and promotion.](https://fathom.video/share/DnXSVR8iTQiS6rhpvYtn3DvsfRxvSg6Z?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Toric has numerous events (conferences) and webinars planned for Aug-Oct, requiring coordinated social media promotion](https://fathom.video/share/DnXSVR8iTQiS6rhpvYtn3DvsfRxvSg6Z?tab=summary&timestamp=61.0)
  - [GrowthX will assist with LinkedIn content creation (1-3 posts per event) and potentially expand to email support](https://fathom.video/share/DnXSVR8iTQiS6rhpvYtn3DvsfRxvSg6Z?tab=summary&timestamp=141.0)
  - [Kaitlin to organize event details in Notion tickets by end of week; will tag Mara and Rafid for content creation](https://fathom.video/share/DnXSVR8iTQiS6rhpvYtn3DvsfRxvSg6Z?tab=summary&timestamp=408.0)
  - [GrowthX to explore helping with post-event content repurposing and proactive reposting of Toric mentions](https://fathom.video/share/DnXSVR8iTQiS6rhpvYtn3DvsfRxvSg6Z?tab=summary&timestamp=692.0)

## Topics

### Upcoming Toric Events

  - [Aug: Work event, conference exhibition, Procore webinar, customer webinar](https://fathom.video/share/DnXSVR8iTQiS6rhpvYtn3DvsfRxvSg6Z?tab=summary&timestamp=80.0)
  - [Sep: Golf tournament, Autodesk conference, AI company webinar, Stanford event](https://fathom.video/share/DnXSVR8iTQiS6rhpvYtn3DvsfRxvSg6Z?tab=summary&timestamp=88.0)
  - [Oct: Procore Groundbreak](https://fathom.video/share/DnXSVR8iTQiS6rhpvYtn3DvsfRxvSg6Z?tab=summary&timestamp=97.0)
  - [4+ webinars planned across Aug-Sep](https://fathom.video/share/DnXSVR8iTQiS6rhpvYtn3DvsfRxvSg6Z?tab=summary&timestamp=116.0)

### GrowthX Social Media Support

  - [Focus on LinkedIn posts (1-3 per event)](https://fathom.video/share/DnXSVR8iTQiS6rhpvYtn3DvsfRxvSg6Z?tab=summary&timestamp=165.0)
  - [Content types: Pre-event promotion, sign-up reminders, post-event recaps](https://fathom.video/share/DnXSVR8iTQiS6rhpvYtn3DvsfRxvSg6Z?tab=summary&timestamp=173.0)
  - [GrowthX needs basic event info date, location, key points) to create content](https://fathom.video/share/DnXSVR8iTQiS6rhpvYtn3DvsfRxvSg6Z?tab=summary&timestamp=146.0)
  - [Kaitlin to provide event images; GrowthX not currently creating visuals](https://fathom.video/share/DnXSVR8iTQiS6rhpvYtn3DvsfRxvSg6Z?tab=summary&timestamp=220.0)

### Content Workflow

  - [Kaitlin to create/update Notion tickets with event details by end of week](https://fathom.video/share/DnXSVR8iTQiS6rhpvYtn3DvsfRxvSg6Z?tab=summary&timestamp=408.0)
  - [Will tag Mara and Rafid in Distribute channel for content creation](https://fathom.video/share/DnXSVR8iTQiS6rhpvYtn3DvsfRxvSg6Z?tab=summary&timestamp=331.0)
  - [GrowthX to assess post quantity based on event importance and existing content](https://fathom.video/share/DnXSVR8iTQiS6rhpvYtn3DvsfRxvSg6Z?tab=summary&timestamp=202.0)

### Post-Event Content Repurposing

  - [Webinars will generate significant content for future use](https://fathom.video/share/DnXSVR8iTQiS6rhpvYtn3DvsfRxvSg6Z?tab=summary&timestamp=526.0)
  - [GrowthX to help parse webinar content into:](https://fathom.video/share/DnXSVR8iTQiS6rhpvYtn3DvsfRxvSg6Z?tab=summary&timestamp=585.0)
      - [Social media posts (company and Tiago's account)](https://fathom.video/share/DnXSVR8iTQiS6rhpvYtn3DvsfRxvSg6Z?tab=summary&timestamp=540.0)
      - [Blog posts](https://fathom.video/share/DnXSVR8iTQiS6rhpvYtn3DvsfRxvSg6Z?tab=summary&timestamp=585.0)
      - [Thought leadership content](https://fathom.video/share/DnXSVR8iTQiS6rhpvYtn3DvsfRxvSg6Z?tab=summary&timestamp=585.0)
      - [Product marketing material](https://fathom.video/share/DnXSVR8iTQiS6rhpvYtn3DvsfRxvSg6Z?tab=summary&timestamp=551.0)

### Proactive Reposting

  - [GrowthX to start monitoring and flagging Toric mentions (e.g., podcast appearances)](https://fathom.video/share/DnXSVR8iTQiS6rhpvYtn3DvsfRxvSg6Z?tab=summary&timestamp=668.0)
  - [Will provide simple copy for DataGrid account to repost relevant content](https://fathom.video/share/DnXSVR8iTQiS6rhpvYtn3DvsfRxvSg6Z?tab=summary&timestamp=724.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Kaitlin to organize event details in Notion tickets by end of week](https://fathom.video/share/DnXSVR8iTQiS6rhpvYtn3DvsfRxvSg6Z?tab=summary&timestamp=433.0)
  - [Kaitlin to tag Mara and Rafid in Distribute channel once tickets are ready](https://fathom.video/share/DnXSVR8iTQiS6rhpvYtn3DvsfRxvSg6Z?tab=summary&timestamp=331.0)
  - [GrowthX to assess tickets and begin content creation](https://fathom.video/share/DnXSVR8iTQiS6rhpvYtn3DvsfRxvSg6Z?tab=summary&timestamp=609.0)
  - [Mara to explore potential email support with sales team](https://fathom.video/share/DnXSVR8iTQiS6rhpvYtn3DvsfRxvSg6Z?tab=summary&timestamp=464.0)
  - [GrowthX to implement proactive reposting strategy for Toric mentions](https://fathom.video/share/DnXSVR8iTQiS6rhpvYtn3DvsfRxvSg6Z?tab=summary&timestamp=724.0)
  - [Follow-up call to be scheduled if needed after ticket review](https://fathom.video/share/DnXSVR8iTQiS6rhpvYtn3DvsfRxvSg6Z?tab=summary&timestamp=805.0)
